sources: NCRB Crime in India 2022 — Pune City data
Ministry of WCD — Safe City Project Pune 2023

zones.name: Katraj Ghat (Satara Road)
zones.description: One of Pune's most dangerous road stretches — NH48 ghat with zero guardrails on several curves.

zones.name: Yerwada
factors: Highest IPC offences per sq. km in Pune
Poor street lighting in inner lanes
zones.description: Area adjacent to Yerwada Central Prison has disproportionately high crime indices.

zones.name: Bhosari Industrial Area
factors: Heavy vehicle accidents on NH highway
zones.description: MIDC industrial zone — frequent theft of vehicles/materials and highway accidents on Pune-Nashik road.

zones.name: Kondhwa Budruk
zones.description: Rapid unplanned expansion means many roads lack adequate lighting and police patrolling.

zones.name: Dhanori
factors: High accident rate on Dhanori-Lohegaon stretch
zones.description: Low municipal coverage area; incidents spike sharply after 20:00.

zones.name: Swargate Bus Depot Junction
zones.description: Highest pedestrian-vehicle conflict point in central Pune.

zones.name: Khadki Cantonment Fringe
zones.description: Fringe area outside cantonment boundary has poor civilian lighting infrastructure.

zones.name: Wagholi Outer Ring
zones.description: Explosive growth with zero matching infrastructure — dark and accident-prone in 2024.

zones.name: Undri-Pisoli Outer Road
zones.description: Developing southern suburbs with incomplete road and lighting infrastructure.

zones.name: Hadapsar MIDC Industrial Zone
zones.description: Industrial belt east of Hadapsar — minimal civilian presence after working hours.

zones.name: Hadapsar (Residential)
factors: Some safety concerns in inner lanes
zones.description: Large residential area with moderate safety — main roads acceptable, inner lanes need care.

zones.name: Wanowrie
zones.description: Mid-range suburb with improving infrastructure; acceptable for daytime travel.

zones.name: Koregaon Park
zones.description: Upscale but risky after 22:00 — concentrated bar/club activity increases incidents.

zones.name: Camp Cantonment
zones.description: Generally safe cantonment area; MG Road and main bazaars need caution for petty crime.

zones.name: Deccan Gymkhana
zones.description: Dense commercial zone — well-lit but congested; petty crime risk at peak hours.

zones.name: Shivajinagar
zones.description: Civic hub with police proximity — moderate safety profile due to congestion and crowds.

zones.name: Nagar Road (Viman-Wagholi stretch)
factors: Accident-prone due to mixed speed traffic
zones.description: Fast-developing corridor with uneven road quality and accident risk.

zones.name: Bibwewadi
zones.description: Mid-city area with mixed safety profile; use main roads after dark.

zones.name: Pimpri Town
zones.description: PCMC area with moderate safety; main roads safe, industrial fringe areas risky.

zones.name: Chinchwad
zones.description: Automobile belt with moderate safety; highway crossings need extra care.

zones.name: Kalyani Nagar
zones.description: Relatively safe upscale area; weekend nights see higher incident rates.

zones.name: Salisbury Park
zones.description: Established residential area with generally acceptable safety profile.

zones.name: Aundh
zones.description: One of Pune's safest residential areas — consistent police presence and well-lit roads.

zones.name: Baner
zones.description: Tech corridor with high footfall and multiple security layers — consistently safe.

zones.name: Kothrud
zones.description: Dense, safe residential area with strong community infrastructure.

zones.name: Viman Nagar
zones.description: Upscale area near airport — high security presence and maintained infrastructure.

zones.name: Hinjewadi IT Park
zones.description: Rajiv Gandhi IT Park — top safety infrastructure. Outer fringe roads less safe.

zones.name: Balewadi
zones.description: Growing upscale suburb with good safety record; near Balewadi Stadium.

zones.name: Erandwane
zones.description: Affluent residential area with excellent safety profile and strong community watch.

zones.name: Magarpatta City
zones.description: Self-contained township with the highest safety rating in Pune east — private security force.

zones.name: Wakad
zones.description: Rapidly developing IT suburb with above-average safety and modern road infrastructure.

zones.name: Sus Road (Pashan-Sus)
zones.description: Pleasant residential expansion zone — safe and improving.

zones.name: Amanora Park Town
zones.description: Gated township with top-tier security — among Pune's safest residential areas.

zones.name: Kohinoor Estate Area (Kuruli)
zones.description: Well-managed residential enclave in the north with above-average safety.
